channel.title: Redmi Note 14 Pro 5G / POCO X7 MIUI Updates Tracker by XiaomiFirmwareUpdater

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.3.0.WOOEUXM Fastboot update for Redmi Note 14 Pro 5G / POCO X7 EEA
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Device: Redmi Note 14 Pro 5G / POCO X7 EEA

Codename: malachite

Version: OS3.0.3.0.WOOEUXM | 16.0

Size: 9.0 GB

MD5: 7eccf823f068ebaf751f56a59ab5bc17

Changelog:
[System]
Updated the security patch to February 2026. Increased system security.
